title: Faint
lyrics: Yeah, I'm, I'm, I don't know why, I don't know why you're faint of heart. When the night came in, you said knock, knock. When the hot pot kicked in, you said knock, knock. Did you faint of heart? Nothing told me to stay there, I did. I can see that you just don't wanna be anything but just lost in the light. Thinking you're the greatest thing from the end of time. Thinking it all revolves around the one spark that's you. Damn it, that can't be true. It takes more people around. Can't do it by yourself, I'm sorry. No matter what, all you do is frown at me and frown at our energy. When we found light and love, now you just say it's negativity. Oh, faint of heart of me. Yeah, I can see you now, you're just not dreaming anymore. Lost in the cosmos of life and you can see that you just could be happy. If you weren't so faint of heart and scared, you could be happy. But you're too scared. When I look at your heart, is it faintly there? Heartbeat is faintly feeling anything here. Fear takes you. Oh, I know you. Want me, want you, want me. What is your fear? Controlling your heartbeat of your life. Still just down, still just down, still just a memory of frown. Still down, still down, still down, living out fear. Make us what we see around. All of us is this. What we're making inside of us, a feeling here. Don't be afraid to heal. Don't be afraid to tell yourself you're the number one deal. You deserve all this freedom. Don't be afraid to heal. If it's your life and your heart is faintly there. Run around me, I'm here. Don't fear again. Sometimes it all goes so, so I guess it's the end. Faintly I hear a voice screaming back. From the abyss of the things you thought wasn't so evident. Sometimes I think you're coming back for me. But then reality sets in. It's faintly gone and it's reality. You're gone, reality. You're me, reality. You're just nothing that I could ever be proud of again. You took it all. Faintly I don't hear shit from you at all. Tiffany.

lyricsSegments.text: Yeah, I'm, I'm, I don't know why, I don't know why you're faint of heart.
When the night came in, you said knock, knock.
When the hot pot kicked in, you said knock, knock.
Did you faint of heart?
Nothing told me to stay there, I did.
I can see that you just don't wanna be anything but just lost in the light.
Thinking you're the greatest thing from the end of time.
Thinking it all revolves around the one spark that's you.
Damn it, that can't be true.
It takes more people around.
Can't do it by yourself, I'm sorry.
No matter what, all you do is frown at me and frown at our energy.
When we found light and love, now you just say it's negativity.
Oh, faint of heart of me.
Yeah, I can see you now, you're just not dreaming anymore.
Lost in the cosmos of life and you can see that you just could be happy.
If you weren't so faint of heart and scared, you could be happy.
But you're too scared.
When I look at your heart, is it faintly there?
Heartbeat is faintly feeling anything here.
Fear takes you.
Oh, I know you.
Want me, want you, want me.
What is your fear?
Controlling your heartbeat of your life.
Still just down, still just down, still just a memory of frown.
Still down, still down, still down, living out fear.
Make us what we see around.
All of us is this.
What we're making inside of us, a feeling here.
Don't be afraid to heal.
Don't be afraid to tell yourself you're the number one deal.
You deserve all this freedom.
Don't be afraid to heal.
If it's your life and your heart is faintly there.
Run around me, I'm here.
Don't fear again.
Sometimes it all goes so, so I guess it's the end.
Faintly I hear a voice screaming back.
From the abyss of the things you thought wasn't so evident.
Sometimes I think you're coming back for me.
But then reality sets in.
It's faintly gone and it's reality.
You're gone, reality.
You're me, reality.
You're just nothing that I could ever be proud of again.
You took it all.
Faintly I don't hear shit from you at all.
Tiffany.
